summary: M4 route and transport capacity planning forecast task is CLOSED after accepted implementation entered origin/main through PR #90 with all required CI checks passing. Route-capacity child threads were closed, M4-MARCH-SUPPLY-STATE-001 was promoted to READY, and goal-mode state now points at the next M4 task.

tests_run.result: Both required PR Gate jobs passed.

decisions: Closed only after PR #90 entered origin/main at the verified main commit.
Promoted the dependency-ready march/supply task to READY without modifying product code.
Cleared route-capacity active thread records after platform close_agent calls returned completed status.
risks: M4-MARCH-SUPPLY-STATE-001 is the first task allowed to add actual march execution state; route forecast remains planning-only.
requested_action: Start M4-MARCH-SUPPLY-STATE-001 immediately under Autonomous Goal Mode.
